name: BS Computer Science
cardDesc: The BSCS program at TCCSTFI trains students in programming, software development, algorithms, data processing, web development, and computer architecture..
modalDesc: The BSCS program at TCCSTFI trains students in programming, software development, algorithms, data processing, web development, and computer architecture. It equips graduates with the skills to design, build, and maintain software systems and computer networks. Students can specialize in areas like Core Computer Science allowing for a well-rounded and flexible education.

name: BS Tourism Management
cardDesc: The TCCSTFI BSTM program is a comprehensive four-year academic program designed to equip students with the necessary skills....
modalDesc: The TCCSTFI BSTM program is a four-year course that prepares students for careers in tourism and hospitality by covering areas such as travel operations, accommodation, food services, events, and tourism planning. It combines academic learning with at least 360 hours of hands-on training in industry settings like agencies, resorts, and airports. The program aims to develop graduates who are skilled, industry-ready, and equipped with practical and technology-oriented expertise.

name: Bachelor of Industrial Technology Major in Automotive Technology
cardDesc: The Bachelor of Industrial Technology (BIndTech) program at TCCSTFI focuses on preparing students for careers in Industrial Technology...
modalDesc: The Bachelor of Industrial Technology (BIndTech) program at TCCSTFI focuses on preparing students for careers in Industrial Technology. It includes various majors, with Automotive Technology as one of the options available. The program aims to equip students with the necessary skills and knowledge for effective production and manufacturing technologies, as well as research functions. Graduates can pursue careers in areas such as mechanical engineering, manufacturing engineering, and electrical engineering, among others..

name: Bachelor of Industrial Technology Major in Electronics Technology
cardDesc: The BindTech-Electronics program is designed to provide students with a comprehensive understanding of electronic technology....
modalDesc: The BindTech-Electronics program is designed to provide students with a comprehensive understanding of electronic technology. It covers fundamental concepts such as electronic components, circuit behavior, measurement tools, and system design. The program includes hands-on activities that allow students to build circuits, test components, and solve technical problems. These activities help students gain confidence in working with electronic devices and understand how different parts connect to create functioning systems. The program emphasizes the importance of safety, accuracy, and proper tool use in electronics work.

name: BTVTED Major in Automotive Technology
cardDesc: The Bachelor of Technical-Vocational Teacher Education (BTVTEd) major in Automotive Technology focuses on.....
modalDesc: The Bachelor of Technical-Vocational Teacher Education (BTVTEd) major in Automotive Technology focuses on equipping students with the necessary competencies to teach automotive technology effectively. This program aims to develop highly competent and motivated teachers in the field of technical and vocational education, ensuring that they are well-prepared to teach automotive technology in schools. The curriculum includes practical training and industry standards to prepare students for careers in automotive education and teaching. Graduates of this program can pursue careers as automotive technology educators in various educational institutions, contributing to the development of skilled professionals in the automotive industry.

name: BTVTED Major in Drathing Technology
cardDesc: The Bachelor of Technical-Vocational Teacher Education in Drafting Technology (BTVTED) is designed to equip students with.....
modalDesc: The Bachelor of Technical-Vocational Teacher Education in Drafting Technology (BTVTED) is designed to equip students with the necessary skills and knowledge to teach and work in the drafting technology field. The curriculum includes a range of subjects such as mechanical drafting, electrical drafting, and technical drawing, among others. Students will learn to use CAD systems and manual drafting methods to create detailed technical drawings. The program also emphasizes the importance of lifelong learning and professional development, preparing graduates to meet the demands of the industry and contribute to the community..

name: BTVTED Major in Food And Service Management
cardDesc: The BTVTEd Food Service Management program at TCCSTFI is designed to equip students with....
modalDesc: The BTVTEd Food Service Management program at TCCSTFI is designed to equip students with specialized training in various aspects of food service management. This includes meal management, bartending management, culinary arts, advanced baking, food costing, and food processing. The program aims to develop students into professional educators who can become high-demand teachers of culinary professionals. It also focuses on developing strong teaching skills, curriculum planning techniques, and classroom management strategies. The program's goal is to shape the future of the food service industry by nurturing young talent and fostering a passion for culinary excellence..

name: BTVTED Major in Electronics Technology
cardDesc: The BTVTED-Electronics Technology program is designed to equip students with the necessary competencies to become effective educators in the field of Electronics Technology.
modalDesc: The BTVTED-Electronics Technology program is designed to equip students with the necessary competencies to become effective educators in the field of Electronics Technology. The curriculum includes a range of courses that cover various aspects of Electronics Technology, such as electronic product assembly, servicing, instrumentation, control, and mechatronics. The program also emphasizes the importance of practical industry exposure and the development of critical thinking, communication, and numeracy skills..
